column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=1 AND title='Senior Backend Engineer')

column.name: description
column.value: Own core microservices, guide architecture decisions, and mentor teammates.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 6+ years building Java/Spring services; experience with cloud-native tooling.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=1 AND title='Product Designer')

column.name: description
column.value: Collaborate with cross-functional squads to design intuitive hiring flows.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 3+ years in product design; strong Figma skills; portfolio demonstrating UX thinking.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=2 AND title='Manufacturing Supervisor')

column.name: description
column.value: Lead shift operations for Globex's new assembly plant, ensuring safety and output KPIs.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 5+ years supervising manufacturing lines; lean six sigma is a plus.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=2 AND title='Regional Sales Manager')

column.name: description
column.value: Drive enterprise sales across ASEAN, building long-term relationships with key accounts.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 7+ years enterprise sales; proven track record hitting quotas; willingness to travel.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=3 AND title='Senior AI Engineer' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Own model experimentation, evaluate vector pipelines, and harden inference services for finance copilots.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 6+ years shipping ML systems, deep learning stacks, and MLOps observability.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Hybrid stipend, on-site lunches, annual AI research grant.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=3 AND title='Implementation Lead' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Stand up enterprise copilots, run discovery, and coach analysts on change management.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 5+ years in SaaS implementations plus strong stakeholder facilitation.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Client travel budget, quarterly bonus, learning stipend.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=4 AND title='Fleet Operations Manager' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Optimize yard throughput, partner with port control, and digitize shift reporting.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 7+ years running large fleets, KPIs, and safety programs.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Housing allowance, hazard bonus, private healthcare.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=4 AND title='Customs Compliance Analyst' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Maintain tariff libraries, run broker audits, and brief leadership on trade policy shifts.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 3+ years with HS codes, free-trade agreements, and customs filings.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Professional certification budget, meal allowance, transport shuttle.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=5 AND title='Clinical Program Manager' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Coordinate multi-site trials, govern milestones, and keep CRO vendors on track.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Healthcare operations background plus PMP or equivalent experience.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Clinical allowance, family healthcare, annual retreat.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=5 AND title='Healthcare Data Analyst' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Model care pathways, build dashboards, and surface variance insights for medical leads.

column.name: requirements
column.value: SQL, BI tooling, and familiarity with HL7 or FHIR schemas.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Education reimbursement, wellness stipend, premium insurance.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=6 AND title='Retail Experience Director' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Define store playbooks, pilot experiential concepts, and measure NPS lifts.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 10+ years in retail operations plus consumer insights fluency.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Merchandise credits, flexible Fridays, wellness stipend.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=6 AND title='Omnichannel Planner' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Balance online and store inventory, orchestrate launches, and drive demand plans.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Strong Excel or Anaplan chops plus merchandising experience.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Remote stipend, learning credits, annual bonus.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=7 AND title='Grid Optimization Engineer' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Tune SCADA models, simulate scenarios, and deliver load-balancing playbooks.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Power systems degree plus Python or Matlab scripting.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Energy credit, equipment allowance, leadership academy.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=7 AND title='Energy Policy Analyst' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Track regulatory updates, brief project teams, and model FIT incentives.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Knowledge of Vietnam energy policy plus analytical writing skills.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Conference travel, wellness stipend, mentorship budget.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=8 AND title='Investment Banking Associate' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Drive live deals, own models, and partner with directors on client materials.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 4+ years in banking or Big 4 TS plus strong financial modeling.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Deal bonus, CFA sponsorship, private healthcare.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=8 AND title='Research Analyst' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Publish sector notes, survey markets, and support diligence with data rooms.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Excellent writing, Bloomberg or Capital IQ fluency, and curiosity.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Book budget, conference travel, flexible schedule.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=9 AND title='Creative Director' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Lead campaign concepting, coach art leads, and ensure brand consistency.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Portfolio of integrated work plus leadership across motion and copy.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Creative retreat, gear budget, flexible Fridays.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=9 AND title='Senior Motion Designer' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Animate shorts, craft storyboards, and partner with audio to ship launch kits.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Advanced After Effects or Blender plus storytelling instincts.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Home studio stipend, wellness budget, remote allowance.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=10 AND title='Construction Project Director' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Oversee smart city builds, manage EPC partners, and run risk reviews.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Civil engineering background plus mega-project leadership.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Housing allowance, safety bonus, leadership coaching.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=10 AND title='BIM Specialist' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Maintain BIM libraries, coordinate consultants, and automate clash detection.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Revit or Navisworks mastery plus scripting familiarity.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Software budget, professional dues, wellness stipend.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=11 AND title='Avionics Systems Engineer' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Design avionics modules, run reliability tests, and support certification.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Embedded C/C++ plus DO-178 or aerospace compliance experience.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Relocation support, premium insurance, innovation bonus.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=11 AND title='Supply Chain Planner' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Model MRP scenarios, align with suppliers, and de-risk long-lead parts.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Aerospace planning experience plus ERP mastery.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Transport shuttle, KPI bonus, premium insurance.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=12 AND title='Precision Agriculture Lead' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Deploy agronomy playbooks, fuse IoT signals, and benchmark yields.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Agritech background plus data storytelling skills.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Field allowance, vehicle support, wellness package.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=12 AND title='IoT Firmware Engineer' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Ship OTA pipelines, optimize sensors, and harden device security.

column.name: requirements
column.value: C/C++, RTOS experience, and hardware debugging.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Lab allowance, patent bonus, premium insurance.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=13 AND title='Security Operations Manager' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Lead 24/7 SOC rotations, tune detections, and brief executives on incidents.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Hands-on SIEM/SOAR plus team leadership experience.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Certification budget, remote allowance, profit sharing.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=13 AND title='Threat Intelligence Analyst' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Track APT campaigns, enrich alerts, and publish executive-ready briefs.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Malware analysis or intel reporting background.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Home lab stipend, conference budget, on-call bonus.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=14 AND title='Urban Mobility Strategist' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Model demand, design service zones, and steer partnerships with cities.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Transport planning experience plus strong stakeholder chops.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Mobility credits, quarterly bonus, gear stipend.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=14 AND title='Fleet Maintenance Lead' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Run EV maintenance programs, manage workshops, and coach technicians.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 5+ years on fleet maintenance plus electrical fundamentals.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Shift meals, safety bonus, wellness coverage.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=15 AND title='Academic Program Director' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Design blended curricula, manage instructors, and report on learner outcomes.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Education leadership background plus data-driven mindset.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Learning credits, mental health support, remote allowance.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Employee stock refreshers, 15 days PTO, remote stipend, and annual conference budget.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Annual learning grant, flexible hours, design system summit travel, and wellness days.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Shift allowance, safety bonus, private healthcare, and leadership development track.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Quarterly commission accelerators, regional travel budget, and private healthcare coverage.
